name: Era of Fairy Sacrifice
description: Ancient time when the fairy race created the crystal shell and many gave their lives to protect the planet.

name: Era of the Great Demi-Human War
description: The 5000-year war between humans and demi-humans, aided by demons, that reshaped world power.

name: Post-Demi-Human War Era
description: The current age, where humans rule, demi-humans are enslaved, and dungeons and towers drive the economy.
